misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, representing Kullo Golf Club, prepares for his anticipated fourth participation in the distinguished Hector Trophée 2026. His repeated entries into this unique pair competition demonstrate a steadfast commitment to its challenging format, establishing him as a persistent and dedicated figure within the tournament's competitive field.

A distinctive characteristic of Ossi's game is his infrequent reliance on the driver, a strategic choice that has occasionally prompted lighthearted inquiries regarding its implications for his on-course "masculinity." This unconventional approach highlights a player who prioritizes precision and control, opting for a meticulous game plan rather than brute force off the tee.

Throughout his previous three appearances, Ossi has yet to secure victory in the esteemed Hector Trophée team event or claim the individual Victor Trophy. Nevertheless, his continued active engagement signifies a persistent ambition. Spectators will undoubtedly follow his journey with interest, as he continues to apply his distinct strategy in pursuit of these coveted accolades.
